# Copilot Instructions

## Performance and Quality Guardrails
- After every major UI implementation, run a Lighthouse audit.
- Target Performance > 95.
- Target Accessibility > 95.
- Target SEO > 95.
- Fix all critical issues before considering the implementation complete.
- Re-run the Lighthouse audit after fixes to verify the score improvements.

## Design and Implementation Guidance
- Keep layouts mobile-first and responsive.
- Use reusable components instead of repeating markup.
- Preserve the site’s conversion paths: strong CTAs, easy contact actions, and clear admissions messaging.
- Avoid flat, template-style sections; prefer premium spacing, glassmorphism, and subtle motion.
- Use semantic HTML and maintain accessible patterns in forms, buttons, and navigation.
